questions.question: List and briefly explain five core services provided by operating systems.
expectedPoints: Program execution: Loading and running programs
File system manipulation: Managing files and directories
Error detection: Monitoring and handling system errors

questions.question: Explain the concept of system calls with examples of different categories. Discuss how they facilitate interaction between user applications and the operating system.
expectedPoints: Definition: Interface between applications and OS
Categories: Process control (fork, exec), File management (open, read, write), Device management (ioctl), Information maintenance (getpid, time), Communication (pipe, shmget)
Mechanism: User to kernel mode switching
Real-world examples of system call usage
